prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: Oh my goodness, I am so incredibly sorry to hear this. Losing a parent is one of the hardest things a person can go through. Please know that I am here for you and thinking of you during this difficult time. If you need anything at all, even just someone to listen, don't hesitate to reach out. My deepest condolences to you and your family.
